2263530.name: Paramedics! - EMS Simulator
2263530.description:
Make every second count.

Step into the high-stakes world of emergency medicine with Paramedics!

The first of its kind EMS simulator.
Experience the challenges of real emergency calls, master life-saving techniques, and navigate the unpredictable world of EMS.


Realistic Medical Simulation
Perform accurate and immersive medical procedures that test your skills and decision-making in critical scenarios.

Progress through the qualifications

Begin your virtual career in the EMS world, and with your earned points, obtain and pass qualifications to progress and expand your knowledge, as well as access BLS, ALS, and many other types of calls and equipment.


Full-body simulation
Using the Pulse Physiology Engine as the backbone with visual, auditory, and text-based scene representations.

Dynamic Emergencies & Unpredictable Calls

Respond to scenarios where patient conditions change dynamically, requiring quick thinking and real-world medical strategies.


Why Play Paramedics! - EMS Simulator?

Passion for Emergency Medicine

If you love medical simulations and emergency response, `Paramedics! helps you explore the world of EMS while having fun.

Train Like a Future EMS Professional
Considering a career as an EMT, paramedic, or first responder? Or already in the field? Paramedics! Provides an educational and challenging platform to hone your skills.

Early Development, Growing Potential
This is just the beginning! Join us during early development and be part of the journey as Paramedics! Expands with new features, scenarios, and gameplay improvements.
2263530.supported_languages: 英语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 波兰语, 俄语, 乌克兰语
